title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The US dominates AI model and chip development but faces a structural disadvantage in power infrastructure relative to China. China's centralized governance enables rapid deployment of ultra-high voltage transmission lines and data centers, while fragmented US jurisdictions force major tech companies to negotiate behind-the-meter and off-grid solutions through regional players like ERCOT in Texas.
